phase_tags.subject: docs: README + ADR 001 'Build on the Ash Framework'
Phase 1: Authentication & Multi-Tenant Foundations
Phase 1.5 — admin-driven school invitations + invite-only onboarding
Phase 2 — Students, Tags, Custom Lists
Phase 2 patch — UX + realtime fixes
Phase 3 — Student Hub
Phase 4 — Flags (with AshStateMachine + AshOban)

Phase 5 — Actions, Supports & Notes. 185 tests green. Three new resources, two state machines, two Oban digest workers, three new Hub panels + modals + detail sheet, Notes timeline merge, open_supports_count aggregate, ADR-007.

Phase 6 — High 5s. 224 tests green. Three new Recognition resources, 128-bit token-based public view at /high-fives/:token, bulk send via Ash.bulk_create with partial-failure reporting, notifier + Oban email delivery, recent + previous panels + bulk modal, roster + header count wiring + no-high-five-in-30-days filter, timeline extension, ADR-008.

Phase 7 — Surveys Framework + Get to Know Me. 280 tests green. 5 new Assessments resources, 22-character token-based student-facing LiveView at /surveys/:token with orange gradient, auto-save upsert via :save_progress, bulk assign via Ash.bulk_create with two modes, AshOban hourly expiry trigger + daily reminder scanner, Forms & Surveys hub panel between Notes and Activity, 9 seeded Get to Know Me questions, ADR-009.

Phase 8 — Insightfull Survey + 13 SEL Dimensions + Indicator Scoring. 314 tests + 2 properties green. New Intellispark.Indicators domain with IndicatorScore resource (paper-trailed, upsert by student+dimension), pure Scoring module with 2.5/3.75 thresholds + property-based monotonicity tests, submit->Oban pipeline via EnqueueIndicatorScoring after_action + ComputeIndicatorScoresWorker on :indicators queue, 13 compile-time-unrolled Student calculations (student.belonging, ..., student.well_being), Hub Key SEL & Well-Being Indicators panel with 2-column chip grid + PubSub reload, 13 per-dimension custom-list filters via exists() SQL pushdown, mix indicators.recompute idempotent backfill task, 26-item Insightfull seed (2 per dim), timeline integration tagged :indicator_event, ADR-010.

Phase 9 — Insights view. 335 tests + 2 properties green. Full-screen /insights LiveView with 13-dimension sidebar, individual breakdown table, pure-SVG donut chart + legend, three cohort modes (student_ids CSV / list_id / school-wide), dimension switching via push_patch, CSV export controller at /insights/export.csv with NimbleCSV, bulk-toolbar Insights icon enabled on /students, 'View insights' header link on /lists/:id, Donut styleguide section, ADR-013.

Phase 10 — Teams, Key Connections, Strengths. 363 tests green. Three new resources (TeamMembership, KeyConnection, Strength) under Intellispark.Teams domain, teacher-class read scoping via TeacherOnlySeesTeamStudents FilterCheck + AdminOrClinicalRoleInSchool SimpleCheck, three Hub panels (role-grouped Team Members, 2-column Strengths + Key Connections), three add modals, bulk 'Assign team members' toolbar action, Phase-11-ready add_members_from_roster bulk upsert, timeline integration with 3 new event kinds, seed block for Marcus, ADR-014.

Phase 10.5 — CustomList Composer UI. 375 tests green. Filter bar grows tag/status/grade/enrollment controls + Save view. /lists grows ⋯ menu with Rename/Edit filters/Delete. Shared <.list_composer> LiveComponent + AshArchival on CustomList + OwnerOrAdminForCustomList SimpleCheck (admin override). ADR-012.

Phase 3.5 — Hub tab framework. 387 tests green. URL-driven tab strip replaces side-sheets on desktop; mobile keeps sheet pattern. New parser, strip component, FlagDetailPane + SupportDetailPane extraction. ADR-015.

Phase 6.5 — Branded email templates + weekly digest. 411 tests green. EmailLayout polish (logo, gradient, branded footer, pill_green title); per-event template refresh with first-name salutation; User.email_preferences JSONB + EmailPreferences.opted_in?/2 + /me/email-preferences LV; WeeklyDigestComposer + Email + Worker (cron Mon 7AM UTC, unique 24h); HighFive :resend action with resent_at audit. ADR-016.

Phase 4 retrofit — close-flow restructure. 416 tests green. Inline Check-up date input + red Close Flag button replaces old Close-button-then-expand pattern. resolution_note becomes optional; followup_at added as optional arg to :close_with_resolution. Phase 3.5 deprecated sheet-event shims removed. ADR-017.
Phase 6 retrofit: rich-text High 5 editor + Re-send modal + per-row icon + 425 tests green
Phase 18.5: tiers + onboarding wizard + billing stub + 442 tests green
docs(readme): add test-count line to Phase 3+10 retrofit section
Phase 11: SIS ingestion + Xello bidirectional embed + 495 tests green
Phase 11.5 — Student Lifecycle Actions (508 tests green)
Phase 14 — ScholarCentric + Academic Risk Index + About-the-Student tab (552 tests green)
Phase 18 — Deployment, CI/CD & Infrastructure

commit_subject: feat(landing): scrolled content layers — phase timeline + architecture + stack + why Ash (LP-3)
